title: gara` #1639
definition:
1) to diminish, restrain, withdraw, abate, keep back, do away, take
    from, clip
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to diminish
        1a2) to restrain
        1a3) to withdraw
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to be withdrawn
        1b2) to be restrained
    1c) (Piel) to withdraw, draw up
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to diminish, restrain, withdraw, abate, keep back, do away, take
    from, clip
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to diminish
        1a2) to restrain
        1a3) to withdraw
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to be withdrawn
        1b2) to be restrained
    1c) (Piel) to withdraw, draw up

    NASB:  to diminish, restrain, withdraw
